scan-all-mailboxes.prompt: Scan all enabled Gmail mailboxes for new emails. Run from Q:/src/personal_projects/gmail-manager/: python -m src --scan-all. After the scan completes, save a self-contained HTML summary report to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/emailer/scan-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.html (using local time, zero-padded) and also as scan-latest.html in the same directory. The report should include: mailbox name, message counts by category (auto-delete, review, keep, rollup), and a link to the full digest at http://localhost:8402/digest. Use inline CSS, Segoe UI font. Open the report in Edge after saving.
scan-all-mailboxes.description: Scans all Gmail mailboxes, classifies emails, generates daily digest
